## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring Manager interview with Ayushi Sharma for Content Manager (SEO) role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ayushi has strong B2B content writing experience, particularly in tech/SaaS](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [She demonstrates good understanding of SEO best practices and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Ayushi is eager for more client interaction and strategic involvement beyond just writing](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [The role involves 4-hour overlap with PST time zone, which Ayushi is comfortable with](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

## Topics

### Ayushi's Background and Experience

  - [Started career at NetScribes, transitioned to B2B structured corporate writing](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Gained experience in tech writing and understanding broader marketing landscape](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Moved to roles focused on B2B marketing as a niche offering](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Currently writing for a project management software company](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Strong desire to combine writing skills with more client interaction/strategy](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)

### SEO Knowledge and Approach

  - [Views SEO as integral to all content, not a separate consideration](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Experience with keyword research, competitive analysis, backlinking](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Process: Google research → outline → client input → draft with keywords](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Uses mix of tools: SEMrush, Google Keyword Planner, manual Google searches](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [Focuses on addressing user intent and industry challenges, not just keywords](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)

### Content Development Process

1.  Initial Google/keyword research
2.  Create outline with key sections
3.  Note areas needing subject matter expert input
4.  Develop more detailed summary if needed
5.  Final drafting incorporating keywords and research

### Differentiating Content

  - [Leverages industry research and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Adds personal touch in articles where possible](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Focuses on niche angles (e.g. "5G in fintech" vs. generic "5G")](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Explains value to clients even for seemingly "generic" topics](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)

### AI Tool Usage

  - [Uses AI for research, structuring, content generation, editing, proofreading](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Emphasizes need for human touch and expertise alongside AI](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Careful to avoid overly AI-generated tone](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

### Client Communication

  - [Previous experience leading B2B client projects](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Comfortable with weekly sync calls and ongoing Slack communication](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Eager for more client interaction in new role](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)

### Role Details and Company Culture

  - [4-hour overlap with PST time zone (likely 6:30-10:30 PM IST)](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [Startup environment that has grown rapidly (12 to 70 employees)](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
  - [More formal processes now in place, including month-long onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [Performance evaluated through managing editor, no formal review process yet](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Work organized in pods with 2-3 content managers per managing editor](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ayushi to complete editing and writing assignment as next stage of interview process](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)
  - [Vivek to provide feedback to Marilia (recruiter)](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=2035.0)
  - [Marilia to contact Ayushi regarding next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/hkb7uty7ahjbeDSYDe4ew2tFsFghdvx8?tab=summary&timestamp=2066.0)
